speaker: speaker1
text: I want to give our kitchen the works .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why ? I think it ’ s convenient and good .

speaker: speaker1
text: No . The decoration has been out-of-date . My friends have a whole kitchen now . It ’ s modern .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why should we run after the fashion ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I am not running after the fashion . I just want a very beautiful and clean kitchen .
